mnemonics: Seaborn Sails: Statistical Stories Simplified (Seaborn specializes in creating statistical visualizations that simplify complex data into understandable stories)
keyPoints: Seaborn is built on Matplotlib and integrates with Pandas DataFrames
It provides a high-level interface for drawing attractive statistical graphics
It simplifies complex visualizations like multi-plot grids and categorical plots
commonMistakes: Forgetting to import Seaborn (import seaborn as sns)
Not setting a style (sns.set_style()) before plotting
Using Matplotlib syntax exclusively instead of Seaborn's simpler functions
